title: cast big mode input
description: Structured input for big mode CLI rendering. Big mode renders a large-text poster (1080x1440) with optional ghost watermark character.

design.description: Design system name. Defaults to 'vercel'. See scripts/lib/designs.js for full list.

phrase.description:
Main body text. Use
for line breaks and word to highlight words. Example: 'Agent 不是
加了循环'

accent_words.description: Words from phrase to wrap in <span class="accent">. Only used when phrase doesn't already contain accent spans. Example: ['Agent']

ghost_char.description: Single character used as large low-opacity watermark. Auto-derived from first accent_word or phrase character if not provided.

attribution.description: Optional attribution line below the phrase. Example: '— Alan Kay'

logo.description: Path to brand logo image. Default: assets/logo.png

brand_name.description: Brand name in colophon footer. Default: 'cast'
